PatchMaster 2.0.1 - License Information
========================================

SECURITY: PM2 ENCRYPTED LICENSES ONLY
--------------------------------------
PatchMaster now ONLY accepts PM2 (encrypted) licenses.
PM1 (readable) licenses are NO LONGER SUPPORTED for security.

WHY PM2 ONLY?
- PM2 licenses are encrypted with X25519 + AES256-GCM
- License contents are HIDDEN from users and AI tools
- Only the backend with the decryption key can read them
- Customers cannot see tier, expiry, features, or limits
- Prevents license analysis and reverse engineering

INCLUDED PM2 LICENSE:
---------------------
Format: PM2 (Encrypted with X25519 + AES256-GCM)
Tier: Enterprise (All Features) - ENCRYPTED, user cannot see
Duration: 30 days (Testing) - ENCRYPTED, user cannot see
Max Hosts: Unlimited - ENCRYPTED, user cannot see
Binding: Portable (works on any machine)
Expires: 2026-05-18 - ENCRYPTED, user cannot see

ACTIVATION:
-----------
The license is automatically activated during installation.
It's included in the package at: license.key

Manual activation (if needed):
1. Via Web UI: Settings → License → Paste the key above
2. Via File: Copy to /opt/patchmaster/license.key
3. Via API:
   curl -X POST http://SERVER:8000/api/license/activate \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -d '{"license_key": "PM2-eyJ2Ijo1..."}'

WHAT USERS SEE:
---------------
When a PM2 license is activated, users only see:
- "License activated successfully"
- License status: Active/Expired
- Days remaining (calculated by backend)

Users CANNOT see:
- Tier (Basic, Standard, Enterprise)
- Feature list
- Max hosts limit
- Customer name
- Issue/expiry dates (only "days remaining")
- License ID

GENERATING NEW PM2 LICENSES:
-----------------------------
To generate additional PM2 licenses:

cd vendor
python generate-license.py --plan testing --customer "Your Name"

Available plans:
- testing: 30 days, unlimited hosts, portable
- poc: 14 days, unlimited hosts, portable
- trial: 45 days, hardware-bound (requires --hw-id)

NOTE: PM1 licenses are NO LONGER supported. All licenses must be PM2.

SECURITY BENEFITS:
------------------
✅ License contents are encrypted and hidden
✅ Users cannot see what tier/features they have
✅ AI tools cannot decode license information
✅ Prevents license analysis and sharing
✅ Only backend can decrypt and validate
✅ Signature verification prevents tampering

Ready to deploy!
